docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,040.00 FILED BY HUBBARD, TAYLOR AS TO DEFENDANT MERRAN, YOHANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUBBARD, TAYLOR AS TO DEFENDANT MERRAN, YOHANN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-25-2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY WITHOUT A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO JUN-20-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 FOR RE-SERVICE OF THE NEW HEAING DATE. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUBBARD, TAYLOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MERRAN, YOHANN $1,040.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,085.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-13-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MERRAN, YOHANN
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED MAY-09-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MERRAN, YOHANN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-20-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-20-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF TAYLOR HUBBARD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YOHANN MERRAN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2019 - JUDGMENT.
